calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mary Bow, 415-410-7941 appearing on her own behalf as Judgment Debtor;
No other appearance.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The judgment debtors CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is GRANTED. The levying officer is directed to release $1,100.84 held to the judgment debtor. (see scanned order)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600 email maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
